raw_text: Here, we perform experiments on the COCO-C and Flickr-C benchmarks to evaluate the proposed untrained TCR in Appendix C. During the experiments, we compare untrained TCR with the best baseline EATA in Table 1-2. From the results in Table 10 and Table 11, we observe that the untrained TCR achieves significant improvement over EATA, even without parameter update, which corroborates our observations and validates the effectiveness of the proposed TCR. Table 10: The cross-modal retrieval performance of untrained TCR on COCO-C and Flickr-C benchmarks under IMAGE MODALITY DISTRIBUTION SHIFTS with maximum severity level regarding the Recall@1 metric.
